name: flag-explorer-2026
description: Interactive Flag Explorer — World Cup Edition. Color all 48 World Cup 2026 flags, master geography trivia and fill your passport.

scripts.mobile:init: npm run mobile:stage && npm run mobile:iap && npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:stage && npm run mobile:iap && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
